text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of Symboli Rudolf's races have been run. She
has carried the dreams of every Umamusume on
her back and engraved the Emperor's name into
the heart of all who watched her race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The words of gratitude she exchanges with me
ring all the sweeter for our shared efforts.
